data.title: Pre-edit hook blocks Edit tool from orchestrator worktree when targeting main-repo worktree paths
data.description: The pre-bash.sh Edit tool hook blocks edits targeting files under /Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra/.claude/worktrees/<agent>/ when the orchestrator session is in a different worktree (e.g., worktree-20260411-145909). The hook interprets all non-matching CWD paths as 'main repo edits', but agent worktrees under .claude/worktrees/ are not the main repo — they are isolated working directories. This causes Edit tool calls to be blocked with 'BLOCKED: Edit targeting main repo from worktree session' even when the orchestrator legitimately needs to touch those agent worktree files (e.g., adding REVIEW-DEFENSE comments, fixing table formatting). Workaround: dispatch a sub-agent with no isolation, or use Python3 via Bash. The hook should distinguish .claude/worktrees/<agent>/ paths from the actual main repo root.
